description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a modern, open floor plan and multiple interconnected sections. The exterior is primarily finished in a light pinkish hue with contrasting dark gray flat roof segments, and the structure includes several distinct wings and courtyards. Large window openings and glass doors are visible, suggesting ample natural light and a focus on indoor-outdoor living. The house includes a prominent garage or carport area, as well as a main entryway that is slightly recessed and accentuated by architectural overhangs. The roofline is predominantly flat, with some areas featuring subtle elevation changes and parapet walls. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, light pink exterior, and multiple wings, featuring large windows and a prominent garage area. The design emphasizes open spaces and geometric forms.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main living area, open courtyards, and the garage section on the left, with the flat roof and light pink exterior clearly visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the house's depth and the arrangement of interior spaces are evident, with the main entryway and front façade most prominent.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear and side wings, the large dark gray roof sections, and the overall horizontal spread of the house.
description_view_3: The back of the house is visible here, with the garage and service areas in the foreground and the main living spaces set further back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with overhang, minimal steps, and a clean, modern door design
